articles.title: Why AI Agents Keep Breaking Your Code (And What to Do About It)
articles.description: Picture this: you write a requirement. Clear, specific. The agent reads it, does exactly what you wrote вЂ” and breaks three things you never mentioned. Not because the agent is bad at its job. Because the spec was written for a human reader, not a machine. Human developers tolerate ambiguity. They fi
articles.content: Picture this: you write a requirement. Clear, specific. The agent reads it, does exactly what you wrote вЂ” and breaks three things you never mentioned. Not because the agent is bad at its job. Because the spec was written for a human reader, not a machine. Human developers tolerate ambiguity. They fill gaps from experience. They ask before doing something irreversible. AI agents don't work that way вЂ” they fill gaps with whatever their training data suggests. Sometimes that's fine. Sometimes it de
articles.author: Artem Kholomyanskiy

How small businesses can leverage AI From accounting to design to market research and product development, thereвЂ™s a staggering breadth of skills need
articles.content: This is today’s edition of The Download , our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. How small businesses can leverage AI From accounting to design to market research and product development, thereвЂ™s a staggering breadth of skills needed to run a business. Large companies can hire experts to handle these tasks, but small businesses donвЂ™t always have that luxury. ThatвЂ™s where AI comes in. TodayвЂ™s models can already take on a range
articles.author: Thomas Macaulay

articles.title: Multi-step form without the overhead
articles.description: A form mostly uses the POST method when submitting. But there is another form method thatвЂ™s rarely used: GET . When submitting a form using this method, a query string is added at the end of the URL you submit to that includes the formвЂ™s data. Probably its most common use case is for a search result
articles.content: A form mostly uses the POST method when submitting. But there is another form method thatвЂ™s rarely used: GET . When submitting a form using this method, a query string is added at the end of the URL you submit to that includes the formвЂ™s data. Probably its most common use case is for a search results page where results are shown based on a query string variable. Using GET works as a way to pass data from page to page, without requiring any kind of backend to do the storing and passing, or Javasc
articles.author: Ovi Demetrian Jr

articles.title: xAI Asks Court to Strip Alleged Grok Deepfake Nudes Victims of Anonymity
articles.description: Four people suing Elon Musk's AI firm under pseudonyms due to the risks of being identified may face a difficult choice: Reveal your real names, or drop the lawsuit.
articles.content: Four people suing Elon Musk's AI firm under pseudonyms due to the risks of being identified may face a difficult choice: Reveal your real names, or drop the lawsuit.

articles.title: How virtual power plants could provide energy for data centers
articles.description: Would you take a payment to ramp down your electricity use? Would it change anything if you were doing so to help power a local data center? Google just signed a new deal to help pay for a virtual power plant (VPP) in the largest power grid in the US. The agreement is with Voltus,…
articles.content: Would you take a payment to ramp down your electricity use? Would it change anything if you were doing so to help power a local data center? Google just signed a new deal to help pay for a virtual power plant (VPP) in the largest power grid in the US. The agreement is with Voltus, a leading VPP and distributed energy resources platform. Voltus will set up the virtual power plant, grouping together devices like electric vehicles and smart thermostats. ItвЂ™ll pay customers to participate, and the c
articles.author: Casey Crownhart

articles.description: From the floor of HumanX, Ryan welcomes Songyee Yoon, managing partner at Principal Venture Partners (PVP), to chat about AI development outside the US, from the need to adapt models to local languages and culture to the challenges of the global supply-chain for things like semiconductors to how ven
articles.content: From the floor of HumanX, Ryan welcomes Songyee Yoon, managing partner at Principal Venture Partners (PVP), to chat about AI development outside the US, from the need to adapt models to local languages and culture to the challenges of the global supply-chain for things like semiconductors to how venture capital is looking at international AI companies. вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂЊ вЂЌ вЂ‹вЂЌвЂ‹вЂЌвЂЊвЂЌ вЂЊ вЂ‹вЂЌвЂЊвЂЌвЂЌвЂЊвЂЊвЂЌвЂЊ вЂЊвЂЌвЂЌвЂЊвЂЊвЂЌ вЂЌвЂ‹вЂЌвЂ‹вЂЌвЂ‹ вЂЌвЂЌвЂ‹вЂЌвЂ‹вЂЌвЂЊ вЂ‹ вЂЊвЂЌвЂ‹вЂЊвЂЊвЂЌ вЂЌвЂЊвЂЌвЂЌвЂЊвЂЊ вЂЊвЂ‹вЂЊ вЂЌвЂЊвЂ‹вЂЌ вЂЌвЂЊвЂЌвЂЌвЂЊвЂЊвЂЌ вЂ‹вЂЌвЂ‹вЂЌвЂ‹вЂЌ вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂЌвЂ‹вЂЌвЂЊвЂЌвЂЌвЂ‹вЂЊ вЂ‹вЂЌвЂЊвЂЌвЂЊвЂЊвЂЊвЂЌвЂЊвЂЌвЂ‹вЂЌвЂ‹вЂЌвЂ‹ вЂЌвЂЌвЂ‹вЂЌвЂ‹вЂЌвЂЊвЂЌвЂЌвЂ‹вЂЊ вЂЊвЂ‹вЂЊ вЂЊвЂ‹вЂЊ вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂЊ вЂ‹ вЂ‹ вЂЌ
articles.author: Phoebe Sajor

articles.title: WiiM expands its whole-home ecosystem with a new soundbar
articles.description: WiiM, the audio company that's challenged the idea that audiophile-level performance requires a small loan, is expanding its whole-home ecosystem with the WiiM Bar, which releases in July. Much like its other speakers and audio components, the WiiM Bar supports a bunch of streaming options and expan
articles.content: The $479 WiiM Bar includes a 2.1-inch touchscreen on its front. | Image: WiiM WiiM, the audio company that's challenged the idea that audiophile-level performance requires a small loan, is expanding its whole-home ecosystem with the WiiM Bar, which releases in July . Much like its other speakers and audio components , the WiiM Bar supports a bunch of streaming options and expandability at an affordable price - in this case, $479. The company's first soundbar has a 3.0.2 Atmos configuration with
articles.author: John.Higgins

articles.title: GitHub Copilot app: The agent-native desktop experience
articles.description: At Microsoft Build 2026, GitHub introduced new tools, updates, and surfaces so agents can work the way you already work. The post GitHub Copilot app: The agent-native desktop experience appeared first on The GitHub Blog .
articles.content: While the agentic shift has made development faster, it’s also led to disjointed workflows, more context switching, and too much time spent reviewing agent-generated code. If agents are going to be a durable part of how software gets built, they need a real place in the developer workflow. Yet most developer tools were not designed for directing multiple agents in parallel. Context scatters across windows. You lose track of what’s running. Code lands in pull requests without a clear
articles.author: Natalie Guevara

articles.title: Microsoft, Atom Computing, EeroQ update their quantum computing progress
articles.description: Some quantum computing companies we've covered have done recent progress updates.
articles.content: With dozens of companies, from small startups to tech giants, pursuing quantum computing, there's a steady flow of results as they try to find a path to utility. We typically focus on new technologies and major landmarks, which can obscure the fact that any big success will inevitably have been built on a lot of incremental progress. The past few weeks have seen a number of companies release progress reports on how they're trying to get the technologies closer to general use. None of these repre
articles.author: John Timmer

articles.title: Apple is bringing age verification to Texas this week
articles.description: Apple will introduce age verification in the App Store for users in Texas starting on Thursday, June 4th. The move, as spotted by MacRumors, comes just days after a federal appeals court allowed Texas' App Store Accountability Act to go into effect while a lawsuit against it proceeds. People in Texa
articles.content: Apple will introduce age verification in the App Store for users in Texas starting on Thursday, June 4th. The move, as spotted by MacRumors , comes just days after a federal appeals court allowed Texas' App Store Accountability Act to go into effect while a lawsuit against it proceeds. People in Texas who are creating a new Apple account will need to verify they're over 18 using a credit card or government ID . Apple may also automatically verify users' age using the age of their account and whe
articles.author: Emma Roth

articles.title: Google ordered to put clearer links in AI search and let UK publishers opt out
articles.description: Google must change AI Overviews after claiming users don't want "lots of sources."
articles.content: UK regulators today ordered Google to put clearer attributions and links to publishers' content in its AI-generated search features. The UK's Competition and Markets Authority (CMA) also said Google must give publishers a way to opt out of AI features in search. "In a world first, publishers will now have effective tools to prevent their content being used to power AI features in search, such as AI Overviews," the CMA said today . "This will put publishers, like news organizations, in a stronger
articles.author: Jon Brodkin

articles.title: Can't make sense of Dashlane's vault theft notification? You're not alone.
articles.description: Security advisory leaves out key details. Dashlane maintains complete silence.
articles.content: ThereвЂ™s a lot that doesnвЂ™t add up in a security advisory password manager Dashlane published Monday, warning that attackers managed to obtain 20 encrypted user vaults. вЂњStarting on Sunday, May 31, 2026, an external party launched a brute force attack against certain Dashlane user accounts,вЂќ the company said . вЂњThe goal of the attack was to brute-force two-factor authentication (2FA) protections to allow the attacker to register new devices on existing user accounts.вЂќ Hello, Dashlane, anybody hom

articles.content: This is today’s edition of The Download , our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. 5 key points in Trump’s new AI order Less than two weeks after scrapping an executive order on AI, President Donald Trump signed a new one on Tuesday. Promising to promote innovation and security, the policy represents a turning point in the White HouseвЂ™s AI governanceвЂ”but is likely to attract criticism from both opponents and supporters of

articles.title: Nintendo confirms it will sell a new Switch 2 with replaceable battery in the EU
articles.description: Nintendo is planning to launch versions of Switch 2 hardware in the EU that will let users easily replace the battery. To meet its obligations from a new EU regulation that's set to go into effect on February 18th, 2027, Nintendo says on its website that it is "implementing measures to comply with t
articles.content: Nintendo is planning to launch versions of Switch 2 hardware in the EU that will let users easily replace the battery. To meet its obligations from a new EU regulation that's set to go into effect on February 18th, 2027, Nintendo says on its website that it is "implementing measures to comply with these requirements by preparing versions of products to meet the Regulation." Thanks to EU regulations, gadgets with user-replaceable batteries are making a comeback, as my colleague Dominic Preston wr
articles.author: Jay Peters

articles.content: Defense tech is red hot right now. Anduril and Mach Industries just doubled and quadrupled their valuations, respectively, and the U.S. government is proposing a 40% increase in defense budget. articles.title: Possible flesh-eating screwworm infection detected in South Texas, USDA says
articles.description: If confirmed, it would be the fly's first breach of the US-Mexico border.
articles.content: A possible case of New World screwworm has been reported in South Texas. If confirmed, it would be the first detected breach of the US-Mexico border by the ravenous flesh-eating flies , which have been making their way up through Central America for the past several years. In a social media post Wednesday afternoon , the US Department of Agriculture said a "sample is now at USDA's National Veterinary Services Laboratories (NVSL) in Ames, lowa for confirmatory testing. We will provide updates the
articles.author: Beth Mole
